_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to exercise judgment when policies are not well-defined.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documenting the rationale, rejected alternatives, and conditions that would trigger re-evaluation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.456), DG-A-003 (DG, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.446). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [defined, exercise, judgment, policies, well] vs WIDAI-only terms [alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible, documenting] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.906, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Ability to exercise judgment when policies are not well-defined." and "Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documentin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.465 ≈ STS 0.446 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [defined, exercise, judgment, policies, well]. WIDAI-only: [alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible, documenting].
